description_long: This is a modern, stainless steel refrigerator with a French door design, featuring two tall vertical doors on the upper section and a wide pull-out drawer at the bottom, likely for freezer storage. The exterior has a sleek, metallic finish with long, vertical handles that are slightly protruding and run almost the full length of the doors. The refrigerator is rectangular and boxy, with flat, smooth sides and a flat top, giving it a contemporary and minimalistic appearance. There is a small, square badge or logo on the upper right corner of the right door, but no visible control panel or display on the exterior. The sides and back are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. This appliance is typical for residential or garage use and would be found in urban homes, apartments, or utility spaces.
description: A sleek, stainless steel French door refrigerator with long vertical handles and a bottom freezer drawer, featuring a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two tall doors with long vertical handles and a wide bottom drawer, plus a small badge on the upper right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat metallic surface with no visible features or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, featureless metallic back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain, flat metallic surface and no visible features.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, square badge is visible on the upper right corner of the right door; details of the logo are not clear.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, protruding handles placed centrally on each door, extending nearly the full height of the doors.
